message:
feat: Implement remaining TODO stubs with real functionality

- unigram_trainer.zig: Delegate to full EM implementation
  - Wrapper around unigram_full_trainer.zig
  - trainFromIterator converts texts to sentences
  - trainFromSentences for frequency-weighted training
  - Re-exports Sentence and UnigramTrainerConfig

- sais_esa.zig: Implement SA-IS and ESA API
  - Re-exports from sais.zig (full implementation exists)
  - Add buildSuffixArray() for O(n) SA construction
  - Add buildESA() for Enhanced Suffix Array

- bpe_trainer.zig: Enable Aho-Corasick vocab lookup
  - Call buildAhoCorasick() from tokenizer_builder
  - Build next_prefix_match table for rs-bpe optimization
  - Falls back to empty table if AC build fails
